system.subtitle: 企业商业版图与供应链递归探索系统

implemented_scope: PostgreSQL background_jobs table with job_type + idempotency_key uniqueness.
background_job_attempts table records each lease attempt, heartbeat, release, failure, expiry and success.
dead_letter_jobs table captures terminal failure payload and final attempt metadata.
transactional_outbox table captures durable refresh events with idempotency, lease, retry and dispatch state.
scripts/job_scheduler.py supports enqueue, lease, heartbeat, graceful release, retry, expired lease recovery, completion and dead-letter transitions.
scripts/job_scheduler.py supports dispatch-outbox-once for pending outbox events and logs dispatch_outbox_event operations.
POST /v1/scoring/recompute enqueues score_recompute jobs into background_jobs with task/acceptance metadata and an active-context idempotency key.

scripts/job_scheduler.py registers a score_recompute handler that validates active-context freshness, writes scoring_runs and score_results, advances refresh_token and completes stale jobs as skipped_stale_context instead of retrying forever.

tests/integration/test_database_migrations.py exercises scheduler idempotency, bounded retry, dead-letter, heartbeat, graceful shutdown release, expired lease auto-requeue, success completion and score_recompute enqueue/execution idempotency.
remote_validation_required: GitHub Actions make verify-g2-db must run migrations, schema checks and PostgreSQL integration tests.
remaining_gaps_before_done: Register curated ingestion and calibration handlers on the scheduler; score_recompute now has a real handler but is not yet deployment-woken.
Add deployment-level wake/supervision contract for continuous worker operation.
Run T1307 4h/24h soak tests for timer, retry and recovery stability.
rollback: Run scripts/migrate.py downgrade --steps 1 to drop dead_letter_jobs, background_job_attempts and background_jobs.
Remove scripts/job_scheduler.py and A206 traceability/evidence rows.
Regenerate release artifacts and rerun make verify-g2-db.
